transcription.text: 10-4, the rubber duck is on the way, good buddy. I had enough of that trying to fix the flat, I just couldn't get a doggone bite. So I called on my convoy, buddy, to see if he could make it right. With a million Midland Seabees around, there's always one to help you out. So thanks to my convoy, buddy, the old duck's gonna get him some trout, 10-4. Join the Midland Convoy, get a Midland Seabee. When you get a Midland Seabee, you get a convoy, buddy, come on. Thanks for watching.
